title: November 7
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 7''' is the 311th day of the year (312th in leap years), with 54 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Bennet Guillory]] is born.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Lindsay Duncan]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Jason London]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 89|''Star Wars Weekly'' 89]] published.
*[[1987]] – [[C.B. Lee]] is born.
*[[1995]] – [[Heir to the Empire 2|''Heir to the Empire'' 2]] published.
*[[2003]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 1]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2006]] – The webcomic ''[[Evasive Action: Prey]]'' concludes.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Handbook]]'' published.
*2007 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 22|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 22]] published.
*2007 – [[Aliens in the Empire|Aliens in the Empire Part 1]] published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2008]] – "[[Downfall of a Droid]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*2008 – ''[[A Reckoning of Wraiths]]'' seventh adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*2008 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Fall of Falleen]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2013]] – ''[[Drawing from the Imagination: Mythological Creatures in Star Wars]] Part 2'' published.
*2013 – ''[[Star Wars: Tiny Death Star]]'' released for iOS.
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars: Absolutely Everything You Need to Know, Updated and Expanded]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – [[Han Solo - Imperial Cadet 1|''Han Solo - Imperial Cadet'' 1]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Insider 185|''Star Wars Insider'' 185]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars (2015) 56|''Star Wars'' (2015) 56]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Destroyer Down 1|''Star Wars Adventures: Destroyer Down'' 1]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Minecraft Star Wars: Path of the Jedi]]'' released.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: Scoundrels, Rebels and the Empire]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia: The Comprehensive Guide to the Star Wars Galaxy]]'' published in the UK.
*[[2025]] – "[[R2-D2 and BB-8 Chased By A Bounty Hunter?!]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
